login.title: Sign in
login.totpHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app
login.errTotpInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Try again.
login.errSessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

search.title: Search
search.typePrompt: Type a query and press Search.
search.noResultsHint: Try a different query or lower the minimum score threshold.
search.errUnreachable: Could not reach the search service. Check that the orchestrator container is running.
search.errUnloaded: This entity is unloaded — reactivate it from Settings → Entities to search it.
search.errNoConfig: No config found for this collection.
search.noFilterFields: No filterable fields configured for this entity (add them to metadata_fields).
search.minScoreHint: Hides weakly-relevant results below the threshold. Leave empty for off.

entityInfo.loadError: Could not load the configuration. Retry.
entityInfo.purgeHint: Clear this entity's search cache (after editing config/synonyms/data).
entityInfo.purgeForbidden: Only admins can purge the cache.

entities.title: Entities
entities.idle: Select an entity from the left panel, or add a new one.

monitoring.title: Resource Monitoring
monitoring.macNote: On macOS these numbers reflect Docker Desktop's VM allocation, not the Mac's physical hardware.
monitoring.unavailableHint: Could not read Docker stats. Check that the socket is mounted and the orchestrator has the required permissions.

logs.title: Logs
logs.selectEntity: Select an entity to view its sync history.
logs.errLoad: Could not load logs. Check that the orchestrator container is running.
logs.noHistoryHint: Run your first sync from the Settings page.

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.selectPrompt: Select an entity, then click Load Graph.
graph.ftsHint: The Knowledge Graph needs semantic vectors to compute the UMAP projection. With search_mode: fts no vectors are computed. Switch to hybrid or vector mode to enable the graph.
graph.computingUmap: Computing UMAP projection... (this may take a few seconds)
graph.tooFewHint: Run a full sync for this collection first, then load the graph.
graph.errGenerate: Failed to generate the graph. The collection may be empty or the server encountered an error.

sync.desc: Trigger a sync for {{collection}}. Full sync re-fetches all records and rebuilds the index. Incremental sync processes only new or changed records.
sync.quantWarning: Warning: collection with >50K records and no quantization. Consider weaviate.quantization: sq or pq in config.yaml.

logsTab.none: No sync has run for this entity yet.

entityList.noEntitiesHint: Add your first entity by uploading a CSV or connecting a data source.

yaml.reloadConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Reload from disk?
yaml.noChange: No change — the suggested fields match the current ones.
yaml.applied: Suggestions applied — save to make the changes permanent.
yaml.heading: Config — {{collection}}
yaml.diffHint: Lines in red will be removed, lines in green added. Click Apply to bring the changes into the editor (without saving), or Cancel to discard.

backup.desc: Off-host backup of {{collection}} (Qdrant snapshot + state set) to the configured S3 bucket. Restore overwrites the live collection.
backup.title: Backups
backup.none: No backups yet for this collection.
backup.restoreDesc: This overwrites the live collection {{collection}} with the snapshot from {{date}}. This cannot be undone.
backup.deleteDesc: Permanently removes the bundle from the bucket and the catalog. This cannot be undone.

upload.step1hint: Drop a CSV or JSON file here, or click to browse.
upload.dropHint: Click or drop a CSV/JSON file
upload.saved: Configuration saved. Sync started in background.

restApi.title: Add REST API source
restApi.secretNote: Set this variable in the .env file before starting the container. The GUI never reads or stores secrets — only the variable NAME is persisted in config.yaml.
restApi.successNote: Configuration saved. Run a sync from the Sync tab to index your data.

mysql.nameError: The name must start with a letter and contain only letters and digits.
mysql.credNote: Credentials are stored as ${VAR} in config.yaml — set the actual values in .env
mysql.idFieldError: ID field must be one of the listed fields.

hybrid.label: Hybrid
hybrid.detail: Combines keyword search (BM25) and semantic search (vectors). Finds both exact matches and similar concepts. Requires an embedding model.
examples: "pompa centrifuga" also finds "pompe a girante" and "WILO CM5"

fts.label: Full-text
fts.detail: Pure text search with stemming and IDF. Very fast on large datasets, no AI model required. Ideal for article codes, short descriptions, product catalogs.
examples: "geberit mapress" finds all Geberit Mapress products

bm25.label: BM25
bm25.detail: Pure BM25 via Qdrant sparse vectors. Like FTS but without linguistic stemming. Great for technical text and codes where stemming could alter the results.
examples: "SIPARIO D=56" finds exact matches without modifying the terms

vector.label: Semantic
vector.detail: Purely semantic search via dense vectors. Finds similar concepts even with different words. Requires embedding. May miss exact matches on codes.
examples: "ceiling lighting" finds "LED panel" even without words in common
